title: Wearable Armors
description: Have you ever had trouble wearing your freshly crafted armor?
body:
### Wearable Armors ``` Have you ever had trouble wearing your freshly crafted armor? Well, look no further because Wearable Armors has got you covered! ```
Creative Combat Tab

This resource-pack replaces the sprites for items that have a completely different appearance while worn. | Models Changed | Models Changed | | --- | --- | | Helmets | Horse Armors | | Chestplates | Dyed Armors | | Leggings | Elytra | | Boots | Saddle | armor may become extremely heavy
guaranteed comfort
caution, armor may clip outside chests once applied
users may experience extreme muscle growth
product smells fresh
villager approved
made in the nether
